programme.title: BKFC 27
programme.desc: From Aug. 20, 2022. Features Mike Perry vs. Michael Page, plus Connor Tierney vs. Joe Elmore in bare knuckle boxing action from London.

programme.title: BKFC 45: Palomino vs. Lilley
programme.desc: Luis Palomino vs. James Lilley, lightweight championship bout. From Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Karate Combat 60
programme.desc: Ilyas Khamzin vs. Alex Lohoré, middleweight championship. Adam Noi vs. Luiz Rocha, vacant featherweight championship. From Yekaterinburg, Russia.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cheick Kongo takes on Sergei Kharitonov in the main event from Sioux Falls, S.D., Aug. 8, 2021.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Former light heavyweight champion, Phil Davis (21-5) takes on Yoel Romero (13-5) who makes his Bellator debut. From Sept. 18, 2021 at the SAP Center in San Jose, Calif.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 130: Zondi vs. Komana
programme.desc: Ntando Zondi vs. Nathanial Komana. From WSB EFC Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.desc: Daily sports talk with The Coach.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Riders Field in Frisco, Texas.

programme.desc: From AutoZone Park in Memphis, Tenn.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: Featuring baseball action from the independent, professional Savannah Bananas World Tour.

programme.title: BKFC 28: Ferea vs. Starling
programme.desc: Features Christine Ferea vs. Taylor Starling for BKFC women's flyweight title, plus John Dodson vs. Ryan Benoit in bare knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico. From Aug. 27, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 41
programme.desc: Features Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, Eddie Alvarez vs. Chad Mendes, plus Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings for BKFC women's flyweight title from Broomfield, Colo. From April 29, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 47
programme.desc: From July 14, 2023. Features David Mundell vs. Mike Richman for BKFC middleweight title, plus Josh Dyer vs. Jared Warren for interim BKF light heavyweight title from Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a rematch between former world champion No. 1 ranked Douglas Lima and Michael Page. Also featured: top featherweights Leah McCourt and Jessica Borga.

programme.desc: The semifinal matchups for the Bellator light heavyweight world grand prix tournament. From Oct. 16, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 48
programme.desc: From Aug. 11, 2023. Features John Dodson vs. JR Ridge for inaugural BKFC flyweight title, plus Keith Richardson vs. Derek Perez in bare-knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico.

programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: Bellator MMA

programme.desc: The team races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff. A rookie is tested in a high-stakes rescue.

programme.desc: The team races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry in harsh, low-visibility conditions.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Volunteers drop everything, juggling jobs and family, to rescue the injured for their community.

programme.desc: This episode investigates how some luxury cruise ships routinely use Magic Pipes to get rid of toxic waste.

programme.desc: Ian Urbina takes viewers onboard ships on the South China Sea to explore the overfishing pandemic.

programme.sub-title: In The Zone: Queen Liliuokalani Canoe Race 2024: Women
programme.desc: Thousands of paddlers descend on Kailua-Kona, and we zero in on the women’s Queen Liliuokalani Canoe Race.

programme.desc: Thousands of paddlers descend on Kailua-Kona, and we zero in on the men's Queen Liliuokalani Canoe Race.

programme.title: In Search of Speed
programme.desc: In-depth look at the top skiers and sacrifices they make to remain at the pinnacle of their sport.

programme.desc: In-depth look at the top skiers and sacrifices they make to remain at the pinnacle of their sport.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Epic weekend adventures designed to push the boundaries of what's possible.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Episode 6 visits the final frontier; Alaska. Endless summer days dictated by nature for a true adventure.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Chris and Dee Hattaway's roles collide when treating a skier with a suspected spinal injury.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Volunteers drop everything, juggling jobs and family, to rescue the injured for their community.

programme.desc: Pro climber Alex Honnold explores the Las Vegas backyard he calls home.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Alex Honnold joins endurance runner Peyton Thomas for an unexpected adventure in the Ruby Mountains.

programme.title: The Horn
programme.desc: When a major storm shuts operations down, Air Zermatt is immobilized while a lone hiker braves the elements.

programme.desc: Alex Honnold scales a vertical bus, a sand dune, and joins Tommy Caldwell for an ascent on a granite wall.

programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson heads to Las Vegas to discover what lies beyond the Strip, uncovering underrated adventures.

programme.desc: A lost hiker, snowmobile crash, and avalanche, testing the team's grit and unity.

programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.
